title: Resolve, to Study the Economic Effects of Instituting a Seasonal Sales Tax
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 20, 2025
last_house_action: 2/4/2025 - Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
